feat.name: Formidable Breath
feat.text: Thanks to rigorous breathing exercises and a diet similar to that of your lineage, your magical breath is more powerful. The area of your Breath of the Dragon increases to 30 feet for a cone or 60 feet for a line, and the damage dice are d6s instead of d4s.

traits.name: Dragonblood
traits.text: A creature with this trait has the dragonblood versatile heritage. These creatures are born of draconic lineage and often have draconic appearances.
